message:
chore: ignore nested crate build artifacts (crates/*/target/)

Prevents crates/vc_tui/target/ and similar nested build directories
from showing up as untracked files.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -57,3 +57,6 @@ storage.sqlite3-wal.corrupt-*
 .beads/*.repair_candidate_*
 .beads/*.bak-corrupt
 .claude/
+
+# Nested crate build artifacts (e.g., crates/vc_tui/target/)
+crates/*/target/
